title: galium diffusum
intro: Galium diffusum, also known as Asperula diffusa, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small white flowers and lance-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Galium diffusum include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Galium diffusum often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to skin conditions and digestive problems.
